scripts.verify:deps: npm run sync-shared && depcruise --config .dependency-cruiser.js shared packages/n8n-nodes-plug-database/credentials packages/n8n-nodes-plug-database/nodes
scripts.bench:payload-frame: npm run sync-shared && npm run build --workspace n8n-nodes-plug-database && node ./scripts/benchmark-payload-frame.mjs
scripts.bench:payload-frame:check: npm run sync-shared && npm run build --workspace n8n-nodes-plug-database && node ./scripts/check-payload-frame-benchmark.mjs
scripts.test: npm run test:root && npm run test:packages
scripts.test:root: npm run sync-shared && node ./node_modules/vitest/vitest.mjs run --config vitest.config.mts
scripts.test:socket: npm run test:socket:core && npm run test:socket:trigger
scripts.test:socket:core: npm run sync-shared && node ./node_modules/vitest/vitest.mjs run --config vitest.config.mts tests/internal/consumerCommandSession.test.ts tests/internal/socketCommandExecutor.test.ts tests/internal/payloadFrameCodec.test.ts tests/internal/customSocketEvents.test.ts tests/internal/socketProtocolContracts.test.ts
scripts.test:socket:trigger: npm run sync-shared && node ./node_modules/vitest/vitest.mjs run --config vitest.config.mts tests/public/socketEventTrigger.test.ts
scripts.test:coverage: npm run sync-shared && node ./node_modules/vitest/vitest.mjs run --config vitest.config.mts --coverage
scripts.test:e2e: npm run sync-shared && node ./node_modules/vitest/vitest.mjs run --config tests/e2e/vitest.config.mts
scripts.test:e2e:rest: npm run sync-shared && node ./node_modules/vitest/vitest.mjs run --config tests/e2e/vitest.config.mts tests/e2e/rest.e2e.test.ts
scripts.test:e2e:socket: npm run sync-shared && node ./node_modules/vitest/vitest.mjs run --config tests/e2e/vitest.config.mts tests/e2e/socket.e2e.test.ts
scripts.test:e2e:auth: npm run sync-shared && node ./node_modules/vitest/vitest.mjs run --config tests/e2e/vitest.config.mts tests/e2e/auth.e2e.test.ts
scripts.test:e2e:stress: npm run sync-shared && node ./node_modules/vitest/vitest.mjs run --config tests/e2e/vitest.config.mts tests/e2e/stress.e2e.test.ts
scripts.test:e2e:hub: npm run sync-shared && node ./node_modules/vitest/vitest.mjs run --config tests/e2e/vitest.config.mts tests/e2e/rest.e2e.test.ts tests/e2e/socket.e2e.test.ts
scripts.test:e2e:ci: npm run sync-shared && node ./node_modules/vitest/vitest.mjs run --config tests/e2e/vitest.config.mts tests/e2e/auth.e2e.test.ts tests/e2e/custom-socket-events.e2e.test.ts
scripts.verify: npm run format:check && npm run verify:surface && npm run verify:doc-links && npm run migrate:workflows:check-examples && npm run verify:deps && npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm test && npm run build
